Label: N/A
Issue: The document does not specify the maximum number of concurrent users the system can support
Suggestion: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: Section 3.1
Issue: The requirements do not specify what happens if the telemetry data acquisition from ESOC fails
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the system's behavior in case of telemetry data acquisition failure, such as retry mechanisms or alerting the administrator.

Label: APAF-FR-07
Issue: The requirement does not specify the frequency of updates for the web-based displays
Suggestion: Specify that the web-based displays shall be updated at least every 15 minutes with the most current data.

Label: APAF-FR-09
Issue: The requirement does not detail the types of errors that need to be handled or the error handling procedures
Suggestion: Include a detailed list of potential errors and the corresponding error handling procedures.

Label: APAF-PR-01
Issue: The requirement does not specify the method of password protection or the level of encryption required
Suggestion: Specify that the password protection shall use at least 256-bit encryption and follow industry-standard security practices.

Label: APAF-CR-02
Issue: The requirement does not specify the storage capacity or performance requirements for the archival system
Suggestion: Specify that the archival system shall have a minimum storage capacity of 10TB and support read/write speeds of at least 500MB/s.

Label: APAF-DR-01a
Issue: The requirement does not specify what happens if the transmission and processing are not error-free
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the system's behavior in case of transmission and processing errors, such as logging the error and retrying the process.

Label: APAF-DR-07
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format or method of distribution for the data sets
Suggestion: Specify that the data sets shall be distributed in a standardized format such as CSV or JSON and through secure FTP or HTTPS.

Label: Section 3.9.4
Issue: The document states that there are no software quality requirements, which is not ideal for ensuring high-quality software
Suggestion: Include specific software quality requirements such as reliability, maintainability, and testability metrics.

Label: Section 3.9.6
Issue: The document does not specify any personnel-related requirements, which could lead to ambiguity in user roles and responsibilities
Suggestion: Include requirements that specify the roles and responsibilities of personnel who will use and maintain the system.

Label: Section 3.9.7
Issue: The document does not specify any training-related requirements, which could lead to inadequate preparation for users and operators
Suggestion: Include training-related requirements that ensure all users and operators receive adequate training on the system's functionalities and operations.
